name: Distributions — Mathematics Process
description: 𝒟(Ω) = test functions (smooth, compact support). 𝒟'(Ω) = distributions = linear continuous on 𝒟. Every distribution has derivatives.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: 𝒟Ω = C_c^∞\ntest functions"]
    D2["Def: Distribution T\nT: 𝒟→ℂ linear continuous"]
    D3["Def: Derivative ∂ᵅT\n⟨∂ᵅT,φ⟩ = (-1)^|α|⟨T,∂ᵅφ⟩"]
    D4["Def: Support supp T"]
    D5["Def: Convolution T*φ"]
    T1["Thm: L^1_loc ⊂ 𝒟'"]
    T2["Thm: δ (Dirac)\nis distribution"]
    T3["Thm: Every T has\nall derivatives"]
    T4["Thm: Sobolev embed\nW^{k,p} ⊂ C^m"]
    T5["Thm: Fourier transform\n𝒮' → 𝒮'"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> T3
    D1 --> T1
    T2 --> D2
    T3 --> T4
    T3 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
